description: Account Owner Display & Assignment. (1) Owner card shows literal 'Owner Assigned' and 'Account Manager' text instead of actual owner name/title — ownerId exists but owner relation not included in getById (F-01). (2) No owner assignment UI or mutation (F-02). Fix: include owner relation in getById query; display real owner name and role; add owner assignment combobox or dialog with user search mutation. Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 2.

wiring_complete.target: Owner name renders from API data; assignment completes <500ms

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md.
